system.description:
When attacking, if the Target is a @Trait[digimon] with the @Trait[baby], @Trait[in-training], @Trait[rookie] or @Trait[champion] traits, they are inflicted with @Affliction[perish 1].

If the target has the @Trait[ultimate] trait, there is a 30% chance to inflict them with @Affliction[perish 1].
